evals.prompt: How do I set up Lemwarm on my new email accounts in Lemlist?
evals.expected_output: Guide to enabling Lemwarm with warmup volume settings, timeline expectations, and deliverability score monitoring

assertions.name: warmup_setup
assertions.description: Explains how to enable Lemwarm on each email account with recommended emails/day (30 for accounts <6 months, 40 for older)

assertions.name: warmup_timeline
assertions.description: States minimum 3-5 weeks warmup before adding cold outbound to sequences

assertions.name: deliverability_score
assertions.description: Mentions the deliverability score out of 100 and recommends targeting 90+ before launching sequences

evals.prompt: I want to build a multichannel sequence in Lemlist with email, LinkedIn, and phone steps targeting VP of Sales at mid-market SaaS companies.
evals.expected_output: Multichannel sequence configuration guidance with channel-specific step types, plan requirements, and LinkedIn safety limits

assertions.name: plan_requirement
assertions.description: Notes that LinkedIn steps require the Multichannel Expert plan ($99/user/month)

assertions.name: linkedin_limits
assertions.description: Warns about LinkedIn daily action limits (20-30 connection requests/day) and risk of account restrictions

assertions.name: channel_mixing
assertions.description: Recommends mixing channels across steps rather than consecutive same-channel touches, and suggests a sequence structure with email, LinkedIn, and call steps

evals.prompt: I want to use the Lemlist API to import 1,000 leads from our CRM into a sequence and get notified when they reply.
evals.expected_output: API guidance for lead import and webhook setup with rate limit awareness

assertions.name: api_reference
assertions.description: Points to references/lemlist-api-reference.md for full API docs

assertions.name: rate_limits
assertions.description: Warns about 20 requests per 2 seconds rate limit and recommends batching for 1,000 leads

assertions.name: webhook_setup
assertions.description: Explains webhook creation for reply events to get real-time notifications
